final:
module shift_register (  
    input clk,  
    input load,  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (load) begin  
            data_out <= data_in;  
        end else begin  
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[15:1]};  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
